title: Paw Patrol Toys PAW01 Paw Patrol My First Smart Phone Toy for Kids Age 3+, Helps Child Development, Recognition, Listening and Motor Skills-Features Fun Interactive Activities, Blue / White
features: LEARN WITH THE PAW PATROL - With Paw Patrol My First Smart Phone Toy For Kids, they can call Ryder and the Pups to learn about numbers, colours and much more. It also encourages imaginative play and problem-solving skills - a great way to develop their creativity!

HELPS CHILD DEVELOPMENT - This interactive toy provides hours of entertainment and educational learning, helping to develop key child development skills including listening, recognition, memory, concentration, attention, language, communication, and fine motor skills. The popular PAW Patrol characters provide a great springboard for learning as children will enjoy hearing what they say and linking the questions to these familiar characters.

BUILD COMMUNICATION SKILLS - It helps to develop a child’s storytelling and language skills, including listening and following instructions. It's a great way to encourage conversation and creativity in your little one!

INTERACTIVE ACTIVITIES - The sturdy child’s Smartphone design features 4 interactive activities to explore including a feature to call up 10 different characters and say hi or goodbye, as well as requests to find the right character, colour or number plus a Quiz Mode. The bold, bright graphics are very appealing and perfect for little fingers to press. For age 3 years and up.

FAMILIAR CHARACTERS - The voices in the Smartphone are the same as in the popular TV show, this familiarity really helps children engage with the toy. They enjoy following the spoken instructions asking them to find easily identifiable numbers, letters, and characters to help them learn as they play.
description: From the manufacturer Paw Patrol My First Smart Phone Toy Meet the Paw Patrol Chase Athletic police pup and super spy Everest Fearless, feisty forest ranger Husky pup Marshall Energetic, funny firedog and paramedic pup Rocky Enthusiastic recycling pup Rubble Gruff but lovable construction pup Ryder Tech-savvy team leader who runs the Lookout Skye Fearless and smart pilot pup Zuma Playful, water-loving diver dog
